sections.paragraph: இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Conjunction / இணைப்புச்சொல்
but, moreover, yet, on the other hand, now, then, in fact, indeed
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: A primary particle (adversative or continuative); but, and, etc.: - also, and, but, moreover, now [often unexpressed in English].
